title: Plush Christmas Cracker Rope Dog Toy Tug Of War Squeaky Dog Puppy Stocking Filler First Xmas Gift Present - Green
features: TOY: Treat your furry friend to an extra special present this festive period with our Christmas cracker festive toy, your dog will have endless fun playing. The fun is endless with this durable rope toy, as your dog enjoys a festive game of tug and war.
SOUND: Christmas cracker toy contains its own internal squeaker, which is a fun & exciting way to stimulate your dog whilst playing.
MATERIAL: Made of safe and high-quality natural cotton, which is quite suitable for teething and dental cleaning. Easy to clean and machine washable, allows your pet to chew and play.

CHEW TOYS FOR PUPPIES: These dog toys are for any sized dog and help with the urge to chew, stimulating their thinking and satisfying their natural instincts. The cotton particles on the surface of the dog toy are good for cleaning teeth while helping soothe your pup's gums and clean tartar.
description: Product Description Snowflake TOY: Treat your furry friend to an extra special present this festive period with our Christmas rope plush dog toy. Festive plush star and snowflake design with colourful rope, your dog will have endless fun playing a festive game of tug and war. SOUND: Each toy contains an internal squeaker, which is a fun & exciting way to stimulate your dog whilst playing. MATERIAL: Made of safe and high-quality natural cotton, which is quite suitable for teething and dental cleaning. Easy to clean and machine washable, allows your pet to chew and play. The cotton particles on the surface of the dog toy are good for cleaning teeth while helping soothe your pup's gums and clean tartar. SIZE: Approximate measurements 36/38cm. Gonk TOY : Treat your furry friend to an extra special present this festive period with our Christmas Dog Toy. Featuring the cutest little gonk, the fun is endless with this durable rope toy, as your dog enjoys a festive game of tug and war. SOUND : There is an internal squeaker in this toy which makes it a fun and exciting way to stimulate your dog while they play, which is a great way to keep them entertained. This toy measures approximately 44cm. MATERIAL : Made of safe and high-quality material. Easy to clean and machine washable, allows your pet to chew and play. ROPE : Dogs seem to love rope toys and are willing to chase rope toys to return to their owners. Rope toys are one of dogs’ favourite toys Chasing rope toys during fetch makes for vigorous exercise that is not only healthy for the dog but can also help bond dogs and their owners during playtime.
